property_history.description: Moved overseas (6-year absence rule may apply)

properties.notes: sold - Owner moved overseas for work 2019, rented out property. Rented accommodation overseas (never owned property there).

user_query: I moved overseas for work in 2019 and rented out my Sydney home. I rented accommodation in Singapore - never bought property there. I've now sold after 6 years.first use rule apply to me?
